results.title: Patriotic golf tournament set for July 10 at Legacy Golf
results.description: This fun-filled tournament features a shotgun start, making it a great day on the course for golfers of all skill levels. Join us on Friday, July 10, at noon at Legacy Golf.

results.title: Cannavaro asks ‘why only us?’ after Uzbekistan searched on World Cup arrival
results.description: Italy's 2006 World Cup winner says his squad was the only team put through a search with sniffer dogs and metal wands on arrival. Senegal received similar treatment on the tarmac.
